description_long: This is a rustic, oval-shaped bowl with a wide, shallow basin and two subtle, outward-flaring handles on either end. The surface has a rough, hand-crafted appearance, with visible textural irregularities and a matte finish that suggests it is made from a natural material such as clay or stone. The coloration is predominantly a muted brown with slightly lighter, weathered edges, giving it an earthy, aged look. The interior is smooth but retains the same rough, organic texture as the exterior, and the rim is uneven, further emphasizing its artisanal quality. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, and the bowl appears to be empty. This type of bowl would be well-suited for utilitarian or rustic urban environments, such as outdoor markets, communal kitchens, or garden settings.
description: A rustic, oval brown bowl with rough, hand-crafted texture and two subtle side handles, featuring an earthy, weathered appearance and no visible decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full oval shape, shallow depth, and both outward-flaring handles.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wide, open basin and the subtle handles at either end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the oval profile and both handles.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again showing the open basin and handles.
attribute_location: outdoor communal kitchen or rustic dining area
attribute_context_of_use: serving or holding food items, such as bread, fruit, or communal dishes
